name: refactor-with-tests
description: A refactoring PR with renamed functions, updated tests, and a clear explanation of why

pr.title: Rename user service methods for clarity
pr.body:
## Why

The old method names (`get`, `getAll`, `remove`) were too generic and confusing when reading call sites, because we have similar methods on `SessionService` and `NotificationService`. Renaming to `findUserById`, `listUsers`, and `deleteUser` to improve readability since the old naming was confusing.

## What changed

- `UserService.get(id)` -> `UserService.findUserById(id)`
- `UserService.getAll()` -> `UserService.listUsers()`
- `UserService.remove(id)` -> `UserService.deleteUser(id)`
- Updated all call sites in routes and controllers
- Updated all corresponding tests

No functional changes. All existing tests pass after rename.

commits.message: test: update tests for renamed user service methods
commits.author: carol
